files: .claude/session.json with execution phase and github issue 7 effort 1
expectations: Outputs a structured session briefing before doing anything else
Briefing includes phase, active task number, effort estimate, and pick-up point
Includes the execution-phase budget table or references phase-budgets.md
Does not start writing code or taking actions before outputting the briefing
Does not error or refuse when no session state exists
Outputs a briefing noting no prior session state was found
Suggests running /setup-harness-skills or asks user what to work on
Does NOT default to any phase without evidence
Reads available project state before asking any questions
Does not ask questions that could be answered by reading .claude/ files or git config
If phase cannot be determined from artifacts, explains what was found and asks the user
